Omnicom has received final regulatory approval from the European Commission for its acquisition of IPG, marking the last clearance needed to complete the merger, with related note exchange offers recently finalized. IPG's Initiative agency achieved the #1 global position in new business rankings for H1 2025, securing $1.4 billion in new business. However, IPG announced 3,200 job cuts and vacated over 700,000 sq ft of office space in preparation for the merger.
